page_content: GENERAL EDUCATION REQUIREMENTS Fundamental Studies ENGL 101 Professional Writing (PW) ENGL 39X Oral Communication (OC) MATH 140 MATH 140 Distributive Studies History/Social Sciences (HS*) History/Social Sciences (HS*) ENEE 200 Natural Sciences No Lab (NS) PHYS 161 Natural Sciences w/Lab (NL) PHYS 260/261 Scholarship in Practice (SP*) in major ENES 100 Scholarship in Practice (SP*) out of major Big Question Courses ENEE 200 Understanding Plural Societies (UP*) Understanding Plural Societies (UP*) OR Cultural Competency (CC*) MAJOR REQUIREMENTS CHEM 135-Chem Engr or 131 & 134 -Fund & Prin PHYS 161 - General Physics I (NS) PHYS 260 and 261 - Gen Physics II & Lab (NL) MATH 140 - Calculus I (MA/AR) ENEE 290 - Intro Diff Equations & Linear Algebra Engrs Engineering Sciences ENES 100 - Intro to Eng Design (SP) 3/3&1
